question: Will May 2026 headline PCE inflation be at least 0.3% month-over-month?
reason: Recent data indicates rising inflation due to escalating energy prices, suggesting a higher chance of a 0.3% PCE increase in May 2026.
evidence: April 2026 inflation rate reached 3.8%, expected to exceed 4% in May 2026 ([kiplinger.com](https://www.kiplinger.com/economic-forecasts/inflation?utm_source=openai))
Gasoline prices rose 5.4% in April 2026, with continued increases anticipated ([kiplinger.com](https://www.kiplinger.com/economic-forecasts/inflation?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: latest US PCE inflation monthly change April May 2026 forecast
